summary: Shifted the chapter opening to an interior cockpit anchor so it no longer mirrors chapter 16's exterior landing setup, and trimmed the final descent phrasing so chapter 16 can carry the visible arrival into Dry Well.
edits: Reframed the opening around Ed's grease-pencil crown on the nav glass before the southbound terrain description.
Removed the duplicated crown setup line after moving that image into the opening.
Adjusted the final sentence to hold approach tension without replaying chapter 16's landing beat.
